title: Recent days
excerpt: Rhythms worth keeping and small moments worth saving.
content:
I've been walking 30 minutes every day—my head feels steadier for it.

Today's list:

- Clear the bench
- Write docs for an old project
- Read one chapter on hardware design before bed

A tiny formula, just because:

$$
E = mc^2
$$

title: STM32 PWM dimming lab
excerpt: Timer PWM to drive an LED, with the key registers called out.
content:
Quick lab notes on PWM dimming.

Core helper:

```c
void pwm_set(uint16_t duty) {
  __HAL_TIM_SET_COMPARE(&htim3, TIM_CHANNEL_1, duty);
}
```

Duty cycle:

$$
D = \frac{T_{on}}{T} \times 100\%
$$

Next: add ADC feedback for closed-loop brightness.
